ops.body: Resolved on main (closeout: fix landed earlier, task was stale bookkeeping). Root cause was NOT a summarizer hang: Claude Code injects a role:"system" message inside messages[], and the wire Role enum lacked System — serde rejected every real body, silently disabling L1 (stage_next parse) and L2 (body_model parse → economics off). Fix: Role::System + segment.rs System arm, observability warns at every silent early-return, RAII StagingGuard. Commits: 8791e65 (parse fix), 1313323 (gate L1 staging on candidates), ee526f9 (test fmt), af9c415 (research doc). Regression tests: d1_segmentation.rs::system_role_message_in_messages_array_parses_and_segments, ccs-proxy staging.rs::stage_next_stages_body_containing_system_role_message. Live-verified per note 80b9abf1 (staged plans + refs.db rows in a real session; residual staged=0 under 429 burst fails open correctly — retry hardening tracked separately in task c3c9a6e).
